description: Root dashboard.json is the aggregated summary consumed by dashboard.md, GitHub Pages, future Web Dashboard, and GyroOS Dashboard. Detailed source data is stored under data/*.json.

generation_policy.principle: data/*.json contains structured source data; root dashboard.json contains display-ready aggregate summary.

project.name: Gyro Project
project.current_focus: Gyro Logic v3.1 release review, mathematical formalization, and GyroAuth formal security model study

current_status.gyro_logic: v3.1 In Progress / Release Candidate Draft / Mathematical Formalization Study Active
current_status.gyro_os: v4.0 PoC active / additional runtime-positioning study deferred
current_status.gyro_auth: Primary and Applied Papers Published / Competitive Differentiation and Formal Security Model Study Active
current_status.gyro_developer_tools: Consistency, publication synchronization, and future criterion-audit tooling candidates
current_status.gyro_hub: Roadmap and Dashboard updated from Project Cycle Reflection

current_focus: Gyro Logic Minimal Formal Model v0

recent_publications.title: GyroAuth: Authentication as Stability-Based Selection over State Convergence
GyroAuth：状態収束に対する安定性に基づく認証
Trajectory-Based Vulnerability Response: A GyroAuth Applied Model for Post-Login Security Monitoring
Trajectoryに基づく脆弱性対応：ログイン後セキュリティ監視のためのGyroAuth応用モデル

research_boundaries: New GyroAuth concepts and fields remain candidates until formal documents are approved
Do not add candidate fields to canonical schemas or runtime contracts
Project Cycle reviews and reflects accepted results but does not redefine GyroAuth
Gyro Logic Core and GyroOS Runtime definitions remain unchanged
next_actions: Continue Gyro Logic v3.1 release review independently from mathematical formalization
Develop Minimal Formal Model v0 in Gyro Logic
Define Authentication Relation Continuity and Criterion Integrity candidates
Design criterion poisoning and baseline contamination simulations
Decide whether Primary Paper and Applied Paper next versions should be updated separately
Keep candidate schemas and responses out of implementation until theoretical approval
